HARD_MODE_001.description: In autonomous paper or live-like modes, LLM, data, rule retrieval, verifier, compiler, or broker uncertainty must result in HOLD or halted execution.

HARD_RISK_001.description: A single position must not exceed the configured max risk percentage or max notional percentage of capital. Legacy validator compatibility also keeps the generic max leverage value.
HARD_RISK_001.llm_guidance: Do not propose trades that exceed the maximum notional cap. If the setup needs too much size, return HOLD or reduce risk.
HARD_RISK_001.markdown:

- Type: `hard_rule`
- Category: `hard`
- Status: `active`
- Markets: crypto

A single position must not exceed the configured max risk percentage or max notional percentage of capital. Legacy validator compatibility also keeps the generic max leverage value.

LLM guidance:

Do not propose trades that exceed the maximum notional cap. If the setup needs too much size, return HOLD or reduce risk.
HARD_RISK_001.title: Maximum risk, position, and legacy leverage policy

HARD_RISK_002.description: Any new non-HOLD trade must include both stop-loss and take-profit planning.
HARD_RISK_002.llm_guidance: If a valid stop-loss or take-profit cannot be defined, return HOLD.
